title: Fix the Maximum Subarray Sum Calculator

statement.markdown: Implement a function `maxSubarraySum` that takes an array of integers as input and returns the maximum possible sum of a subarray. A subarray is a contiguous segment of an array. For example, if the input array is `[1, -2, 3, 4, -5, 4]`, the possible subarrays are `[1], [-2], [3], [4], [-5], [4], [1, -2], [1, -2, 3], [1, -2, 3, 4], [-2, 3], [-2, 3, 4], [-2, 3, 4, -5], [3, 4], [3, 4, -5], [3, 4, -5, 4]`. The maximum sum of a subarray is `10` (for the subarray `[3, 4, -5, 4]`).
statement.outputFormat: The maximum possible sum of a subarray.
statement.notes: The input array will contain at least one element.

constraints.description: The length of the input array.
The elements of the input array.

examples.explanation: The maximum sum of a subarray is 7 (for the subarray [4, -1, -2, 1, 5]).
The maximum sum of a subarray is 9 (for the subarray [1, 2, -1, 3, 4]).

hints.text: Use Kadane's algorithm to find the maximum subarray sum.

editorial.title: Editorial title
editorial.betterSolution: Kadane's algorithm is better than brute force.
